name: Create Trello Cards from New Shopify Orders

path.boardId: {{ template | label: 'Select your Trello board.', description: 'Choose the Trello board where new cards will be created. This is the board you want your incoming Shopify orders to appear on.' }}

query.idList: {{ template | label: 'Select your Trello list.', description: 'Choose the list on that board where each new order card will be added. In Trello, lists are the columns inside a board — for example, ''To Do'', ''In Progress'', or ''Orders to Fulfill''.' }}
query.name: Order {{shopify.name}}
